commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio apply --server-side -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubeflow/mpi-operator/v0.6.0/deploy/v2beta1/mpi-operator.yaml 2>&1 | tail -20'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio apply --server-side -f https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/lws/releases/download/v0.7.0/manifests.yaml 2>&1 | tail -20'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n mpi-operator 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n lws-system 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get crd | grep -E "mpijobs|leaderworkerset" 2>&1'
